textwrap/TextWrapper/max_lines.name: max_lines
textwrap/TextWrapper/max_lines.description: (default: None) If not None, then the output will contain at most max_lines lines, with placeholder appearing at the end of the output. Added in version 3.4.

info.excerpt: (default: None) If not None, then the output will contain at most max_lines lines, with placeholder appearing at the end of the output. Added in version 3.4.
